# infomaniak_public_cloud (Resource)

Manages an Infomaniak Public Cloud product. Public Cloud products cannot be ordered through the Infomaniak public API; this resource can only manage products that already exist. Order the product via the Manager UI, then run `terraform import infomaniak_public_cloud.<name> <public_cloud_id>` to bring it under Terraform. Removing the resource only clears Terraform state — the product remains billed at Infomaniak.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# The Public Cloud product cannot be ordered via the API. Order it from the
# Manager UI first, then bring it under Terraform with `terraform import`.
resource "infomaniak_public_cloud" "this" {
  customer_name  = "my-cloud"
  description    = "Production Public Cloud"
  bill_reference = "PO-2026-001"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `bill_reference` (String) Billing reference set on the product. Minimum 2 characters; the API rejects empty values and once set the value cannot be cleared via PATCH.
- `customer_name` (String) Customer-defined name for the Public Cloud product. Minimum 2 characters; the API rejects empty values.
- `description` (String) Free-form description. Minimum 2 characters; the API rejects empty values.

### Read-Only

- `account_id` (Number) Identifier of the Infomaniak account owning the product.
- `created_at` (Number) Creation timestamp (Unix seconds).
- `expired_at` (Number) Expiration timestamp (Unix seconds).
- `has_maintenance` (Boolean) Is a maintenance currently active.
- `has_operation_in_progress` (Boolean) Is an asynchronous operation currently running.
- `id` (Number) Unique identifier of the Public Cloud product. Set during import.
- `internal_name` (String) Internal Infomaniak identifier. May be empty.
- `is_free` (Boolean) Is the product billed at zero (free tier).
- `is_locked` (Boolean) Is the product locked.
- `is_trial` (Boolean) Is the product currently in trial mode.
- `is_zero_price` (Boolean) Is the product priced at zero.
- `service_id` (Number) Identifier of the Infomaniak service for Public Cloud.
- `service_name` (String) Service name.
